w:r.w:t: Mara opened the rusted gate and swore she had never visited this town before.
By sunset she described, in detail, the bakery she claimed she did not remember.
Jon carried only one lantern into the tunnel, but later hung three lanterns on the wall.
The timeline jumps from Monday dawn to Sunday midnight in a single paragraph.
Mara promised never to lie, then hides a letter and denies seeing it.
The chapter ends with a clear cliffhanger for continuity and character review tests.
